home.tagline: Collect and send money instantly. No bank. No hidden fees.
home.cobrar_sub: Generate a link and share it with your customer
home.cobrar_tag: Money goes directly to your card
home.remesa_sub: Transfer to anywhere in the world
home.trust_no_storage: No database. No storage. Just you and your customer.
home.trust_instant: Instant payments via Visa / Mastercard network

cobrar.title: Collect payment
cobrar.setup_hint: Only done once. Stripe will verify your identity to deposit to your card.
cobrar.share_message: Payment of {amount} to {merchant}. Tap the link to pay:
cobrar.error_generic: Error generating the charge. Please try again.

pagar.your_card_label: Your debit card (to receive the money)
pagar.card_hint: 16 digits of your Visa or Mastercard debit card
pagar.stripe_trust: Secure payment by Stripe. Your card data never touches OmniPay.
pagar.card_trust: Funds are deposited directly to your card. Single-use link.
pagar.stripe_redirect_note: You'll be redirected to Stripe to enter your card
pagar.instant_note: The deposit will arrive in seconds to your card
pagar.expired_link: This link has expired (10 min). Ask for a new one.
pagar.processing_note: You'll receive an SMS when it credits
pagar.error_invalid_account: Incorrect account details. Please verify and try again.
pagar.account_trust_card: Debit card · via Paysend / Visa Direct
pagar.processing_note_card: Your money will arrive in seconds to your card
pagar.error_card_not_eligible: This card is not eligible for international deposits. Try with a different card or use bank account.

remesa.title: Send remittance
remesa.kyc_warning: Amounts over $1,000 may require identity verification from the provider. Have your official ID ready.
remesa.sender_card_hint: Enter your details to receive a receipt and charge your card
remesa.sender_card_hint2: 16 digits of your Visa or Mastercard debit card
remesa.recipient_hint: Who are you sending money to?
remesa.share_hint: Send this link to the recipient via WhatsApp:
remesa.share_message: Hi, I sent you {amount} ({dest}) via OmniPay. Open the link to receive money to your card (valid 10 min):
remesa.error_tokenize: Error processing your card. Check the details.
remesa.error_generic: Error generating the transfer. Please try again.
remesa.charge_cad: Charged in CAD (no Stripe FX fee)

resultado.failed_sub: Check your details and try again.
resultado.receipt_invalid_sub: This receipt was tampered with or was not generated by OmniPay.
resultado.receipt_note: Authentic receipt. Contains no card or bank account data.
resultado.wise_eta_note: Transfer arrives in 1-2 business days. You will receive an SMS when it credits.

page.footer_security: 🔒 Account data is encrypted — OmniPay does not store it
page.error_required: Please fill in all required fields.
page.error_account: Account number is not valid for the selected country.
page.error_amount: Enter a valid amount greater than zero.
page.share_quote_note: Exact amount calculated with live interbank rate at time of payment.
page.share_no_quote: Client will see the amount when opening the link.
page.liquidity_msg: Our commercial processing lines are experiencing high settlement volume. To guarantee your transaction integrity, new processing slots will open in 15 minutes. Thank you for your patience.
page.done_msg: The invoice settlement has been processed successfully. {name} will receive confirmation by SMS.
page.error_default: We could not process the request. No charge was made.
page.checkout_trust: 🔒 Secured by Stripe · We never store your card
page.pwa_ios_steps: Tap Share (□↑) in Safari → Add to Home Screen → Add
page.wa_msg_corporate:
{who} requests settlement of their service invoice.
Pay here: {link}
page.wa_msg_individual:
{who} requests payment of their professional fees for {amount}.
Pay here: {link}

landing.feat1_body: Generate cryptographically signed payment links in seconds. Each link is HMAC-SHA256 authenticated and expires automatically.
landing.feat2_body: Real-time Wise interbank FX rates applied at the exact moment of settlement. CLABE · IBAN · ACH · PIX · UPI across 170+ countries.
landing.feat3_body: Zero-Data-Retention architecture. All account credentials are AES-256-GCM encrypted client-side and never stored on our servers.
landing.pricing_sub: No monthly subscription. No setup fees. Pay only per transaction.
landing.pricing_standard_li2: ✓ Bank transfer rails (SEPA · ACH · PIX · CLABE)
landing.pricing_instant_li2: ✓ Debit card rails (Visa Direct · MC Send)
landing.form_sub: Fill in the details below to create a secure, encrypted payment link.

p2p.share_hint: Share with the person sending money:
p2p.share_message: {name} wants to receive {amount} MXN. Pay here: {link}
p2p.error_unavailable: P2P service not yet available. Please try again later.
p2p.feat1_body: Transfer directly to any Mexican bank account (CLABE) via SPEI. Payer uses their local card anywhere in the world.
p2p.feat2_body: Up to 60% cheaper than Western Union or PayPal. Real-time Bitso FX rate applied at the moment of transfer. 1% OmniPay fee.
p2p.feat3_body: No account needed. No registration. Recipient receives MXN in their CLABE within minutes. No crypto knowledge required.
p2p.pricing_sub: No hidden fees. No exchange rate markups. Just one simple formula.
p2p.pricing_example: Example: $300 USD sent → $3.99 OmniPay fee (vs. ~$17 Western Union)
p2p.pricing_card1_li3: ✓ No Stripe, no bank account needed
p2p.form_sub: Fill in the details below. Share the link with whoever will send you money.
p2p.card_or_bank: How does the recipient want to receive?
p2p.error_card_unavailable: Card payout unavailable for this country. Switching to bank transfer.
